title: hotato failure record index, schema failure-record-index.v1
description: A closed, byte-deterministic index over the set of share-safe Failure Records rendered from ONE source result (a hotato test-run, suite-run, or contract-verify document). It records only structure: the source kind + digest, how many non-passing units the source contained (total_failures), how many were rendered, whether the set was truncated by a record limit, and one entry per rendered record pointing at its content-addressed child directory. There is no wall-clock field and no aggregate or blended score -- an index groups records, it never scores them. Every entry cross-checks its own failure-record.json (record_id, status, headline, and the sha256- directory name).
